entry.title: Re: Team owner - Manage Teams and Responsibilities
entry.content: Hello Medeni, have you found any solution for your last reply? I am facing same issue.

entry.title: Re: How to Properly Refresh a Page on Side Drawer Navigat...
entry.content: I've tried using clear history true and closing the page on unload, which should reload the page when opened the next time , but it's still not refreshing the new page

entry.title: Cleanup after migrating a system from Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi

 

We are testing SAP Cloud ALM  (CALM) as a replacement of Solution Manager.

 

Thus far the experience has been good with setup well documented and the user experience of Operations being good.

 

One process I have not yet found documented is disconnecting systems from Solution Manager once they are connected to CALM. Therefore, at the moment, the pilot system is sending information to both Solution Manager and CALM.  

Also, should they be removed from the SLD and LMDB once they're connected to CALM? What of SDCC - should there be any changes to this configuration.

Thank you in advance of any pointers / advice /suggestions.

 

Gavin

entry.title: Re: Usage Decision Status Reversal for Non - stock relevant inspection.
entry.content:
I've implemented the SAP note so we are able to reverse the UD.

I have still one issue. When I reverse the UD the system is not allowing to take a new UD to the same inspection lot. Is it the same for you?

entry.title: ETIMEDOUT for SAP CAP App on BTP with external Postgres DB
entry.content:
Hi all,

we have a SAP CAP based application running on BTP CF. We are using an external Postgres DB for storing our data. This Postgres DB runs in a docker container which on a VM hosted on a dedicated HETZNER server.

From time to time (~10-60 mins) we see TCP connection timeouts in the SAP CAP backend like this:

 

2024-09-16T07:41:56.145+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDOUT [odata] - POST /odata/v4/api/fawkes/$batch
2024-09-16T07:41:56.150+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDOUT [odata] - > currentUser currentUser()
2024-09-16T07:41:56.150+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDOUT [user_service] - Instantiated User Service
2024-09-16T07:41:56.150+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDOUT [user_service] - getOrCreateUser --> Start
2024-09-16T07:41:56.150+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDOUT [user_service] - Checking DB for employee with id 3229
2024-09-16T07:43:46.793+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDOUT [2024-09-16T07:43:46.791Z] [31mERROR[39m    Error: read ETIMEDOUT
2024-09-16T07:43:46.793+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDOUT at TCP.onStreamRead (node:internal/stream_base_commons:217:20)
2024-09-16T07:43:46.793+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDOUT at TCP.callbackTrampoline (node:internal/async_hooks:128:17)
2024-09-16T07:43:46.795+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR [cds] - ️Uncaught Error: read ETIMEDOUT
2024-09-16T07:43:46.796+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR at TCP.onStreamRead (node:internal/stream_base_commons:217:20)
2024-09-16T07:43:46.796+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR at TCP.callbackTrampoline (node:internal/async_hooks:128:17) {
2024-09-16T07:43:46.796+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR errno: -110,
2024-09-16T07:43:46.796+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR code: 'ETIMEDOUT',
2024-09-16T07:43:46.796+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR syscall: 'read'
2024-09-16T07:43:46.796+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR }
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR [cds] - Error: read ETIMEDOUT
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR at /home/vcap/deps/0/node_modules/pg/lib/client.js:526:17
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR at async Object.all (/home/vcap/deps/0/node_modules/@cap-js/postgres/lib/PostgresService.js:174:26)
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR at async PostgresService._checkCollation (/home/vcap/deps/0/node_modules/@cap-js/postgres/lib/PostgresService.js:97:21)
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR at async Promise.all (index 1)
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR at async PostgresService.begin (/home/vcap/deps/0/node_modules/@cap-js/db-service/lib/common/DatabaseService.js:70:7)
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR at async PostgresService._begin [as dispatch] (/home/vcap/deps/0/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-tx.js:199:3) {
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR errno: -110,
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR code: 'ETIMEDOUT',
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR syscall: 'read',
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR query: "SELECT collname FROM pg_collation WHERE collname = 'en-x-icu';\n ^",
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR id: '1397371',
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR level: 'ERROR',
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR timestamp: 1726472626799
2024-09-16T07:43:46.806+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR }
2024-09-16T07:43:46.810+0000 [RTR/1] STDOUT XXX-fawkes-backend.cfapps.eu30.hana.ondemand.com - [2024-09-16T07:41:56.136234108Z] "POST /odata/v4/api/fawkes/$batch HTTP/1.1" 200 395 324 "https://XXX-approuter.cfapps.eu30.hana.ondemand.com/XXX/index.html" "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/128.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "10.1.8.0:30362" "10.1.9.9:61175" x_forwarded_for:"45.158.172.157, 10.1.8.1, 34.159.201.78, 10.1.8.0" x_forwarded_proto:"https" vcap_request_id:"72ddb4ca-6d57-4f41-5353-47909f3e9818" response_time:110.674250 gorouter_time:0.000126 app_id:"29f701b7-10bd-4dfe-9ea0-c1a1b6d3189b" app_index:"0" instance_id:"a2de1dff-2ea3-4cc2-47db-6e54" failed_attempts:0 failed_attempts_time:"-" dns_time:0.000000 dial_time:0.000000 tls_time:0.000000 backend_time:110.674125 x_cf_routererror:"-" x_correlationid:"72ddb4ca-6d57-4f41-5353-47909f3e9818" tenantid:"fawkes" sap_passport:"-" x_scp_request_id:"10e6c249-8c08-469b-8e4b-9bcf732f1271-66E7E144-9DE41A" x_cf_app_instance:"-" x_forwarded_host:"XXX-approuter.cfapps.eu30.hana.ondemand.com" x_custom_host:"-" x_ssl_client:"-" x_ssl_client_session_id:"-" x_ssl_client_verify:"-" x_ssl_client_subject_dn:"-" x_ssl_client_subject_cn:"-" x_ssl_client_issuer_dn:"-" x_ssl_client_notbefore:"-" x_ssl_client_notafter:"-" x_cf_forwarded_url:"-" traceparent:"-" true_client_ip:"-" x_request_id:"-" x_b3_traceid:"72ddb4ca6d574f41535347909f3e9818" x_b3_spanid:"535347909f3e9818" x_b3_parentspanid:"-" b3:"72ddb4ca6d574f41535347909f3e9818-535347909f3e9818"
2024-09-16T07:43:48.138+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR npm notice
2024-09-16T07:43:48.138+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR npm notice New minor version of npm available! 10.7.0 -> 10.8.3
2024-09-16T07:43:48.138+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR npm notice Changelog: https://github.com/npm/cli/releases/tag/v10.8.3
2024-09-16T07:43:48.138+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR npm notice To update run: npm install -g npm@10.8.3
2024-09-16T07:43:48.138+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDERR npm notice
2024-09-16T07:43:48.173+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] STDOUT Exit status 0
2024-09-16T07:43:48.184+0000 [CELL/SSHD/0] STDOUT Exit status 0
2024-09-16T07:43:53.700+0000 [CELL/0] STDOUT Cell 80e41736-2c4c-42a7-9cd7-971d529a7321 stopping instance a2de1dff-2ea3-4cc2-47db-6e54
2024-09-16T07:43:53.700+0000 [CELL/0] STDOUT Cell 80e41736-2c4c-42a7-9cd7-971d529a7321 destroying container for instance a2de1dff-2ea3-4cc2-47db-6e54
2024-09-16T07:43:53.711+0000 [API/11] STDOUT Process has crashed with type: "web"
2024-09-16T07:43:53.733+0000 [API/11] STDOUT App instance exited with guid 29f701b7-10bd-4dfe-9ea0-c1a1b6d3189b payload: {"instance"=>"a2de1dff-2ea3-4cc2-47db-6e54", "index"=>0, "cell_id"=>"80e41736-2c4c-42a7-9cd7-971d529a7321", "reason"=>"CRASHED", "exit_description"=>"Codependent step exited", "crash_count"=>1, "crash_timestamp"=>1726472633684041865, "version"=>"4a8848ae-2f50-4f13-b2c5-e8a3a64f44c5"}
2024-09-16T07:43:53.758+0000 [CELL/0] STDOUT Cell 6b4fecb4-665c-4073-9832-853892f693ef creating container for instance ae994730-42d9-4bdf-55a6-bbd7
2024-09-16T07:43:53.881+0000 [PROXY/0] STDOUT Exit status 137

 

On Postgres Side the log looks like this (don't be confused for the timestamps not matching):

 

2024-09-13 16:25:17.775 UTC [239] LOG:  could not receive data from client: Connection timed out
2024-09-13 16:25:17.775 UTC [238] LOG:  could not receive data from client: Connection timed out
2024-09-13 16:46:02.959 UTC [375] LOG:  could not receive data from client: Connection timed out
2024-09-13 16:47:08.495 UTC [391] LOG:  could not receive data from client: Connection timed out
2024-09-13 16:47:08.495 UTC [392] LOG:  could not receive data from client: Connection timed out

 

There is no explicit firewall configured and the connection to the database itself works - at least for a certain amount of time.

For testing purposes, I subscribed to the BTP Postgres service and created a binding to the application. In this setup, I don't have any connection issues.

I have already tried these things:

  • Using the same Postgres DB version in my own setup as the DB which is provisioned in BTP
  • Use the same (or almost the same) configuration of the database in my own setup as the BTP Postgres DB
  • Tried two different locations for providing my own postgres db

So the question is: Why do I have these connection timeouts? I'm a bit out of ideas what to try next so any help is really appreciated!

Thanks
Andreas

entry.title: User Exit For IW47
entry.content:
hello,

i need to add a field in the input parameters to the IW47 transaction
should i use a user exit? which one should i use?

thanks

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: Nala supervising my workspace...

entry.title: Re: User-defined fields order
entry.content: This method allows you to set the display order of UDFs for all users accessing that specific form within SAP Business. Speak to your SAP B1 administrator if you encounter permissions issues or if the settings do not seem to apply to all users as expected

entry.title: Real Talk with Katya and Jerome | Artificial Intelligence Track Leads
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

We’re Katya Reznik and Jerome Simonetti, and we’re excited to introduce ourselves and give you a glimpse of what to expect from the AI track sessions at this year’s TechEd. 

Katya: Originally from Russia, I’ve lived in Israel for the past 9 years. I love wandering in the desert, snowboarding, diving in cenotes and seas, and exploring nature. I travel a lot, learn languages, make pottery, enjoy the rain, love all dogs and people with a sense of humor. I’m part of the Business AI unit and often talk about technologies and our future:) 

Jerome: I’m Product Expert at SAP Business AI Product Management team. I like to go on multi-day hikes with my wife. My vacation is a subtle balance between visiting cities and museums and going hiking. In terms of art, I'm quite eclectic. I love music (jazz, lyrical, opera) and I regularly go to concerts. I love painting, especially the Italian grandmasters of the 15th and 16th century.  I also like comics. I am married. I have 3 children who are adults. 2 of them have children! 

With our AI track you will learn how innovations like Joule, our generative AI copilot, and Large Language Models (LLMs) are transforming key areas such as finance, HR, supply chain, and IT. Discover real-world success stories, expert insights, and actionable ways to enhance decision-making and agility in your organization. 

We look forward to sharing insights and innovations in AI with you at TechEd! 

What inspired you to specialize in this track? 

The transformative potential of AI and how it can revolutionize the way businesses operate is truly fascinating. It’s an exciting opportunity to dive deep into topics of generative AI, machine learning, knowledge graphs and much more. Specializing in this track allows us to explore/witness real-world success stories and expert insights. 

How does this track embody the ‘where ideas get real’ spirit? 

This track perfectly captures the ‘where ideas get real’ spirit by offering both hands-on experience and real-world applications. The two jump-start sessions bring AI from theory to practical implementation: Set up Joule to answer your own policy documents and Build your own generative AI scenario for your use case. Additionally, our sessions with customers like Sappi and the City of Hamburg and a partner MSG showcase how AI is already driving innovation and delivering results in real business environments. 

Track stars (top sessions to keep on your radar): 

  • AI100 - Artificial intelligence that creates real-world results 
  • AI105 - Examining how to onboard and extend Joule 
  • AI106 - Harness retrieval-augmented generation in Joule and generative AI hub 
  • AI104 - Revolutionize ABAP development with Joule, our generative AI copilot 
  • AI108 - How AI agents can support your business in the future 
  • AI102 - Enhance business predictions with SAP Foundation Model and knowledge graphs 
  • AI101 - Enable more secure and responsible generative AI 

What should be in everyone’s TechEd toolkit for 2024? 

  • Curiosity & Questions: Most importantly, come with an open mind and questions. TechEd is about learning, so actively participate in sessions, ask the experts, and explore new ideas. 
  • Time Management: With so many sessions, it's easy to get overwhelmed. Build your agenda and don’t forget to schedule breaks to keep yourself fresh and engaged throughout the day. 
  • Comfortable Workspace ️: Since TechEd is virtual, set up a comfortable and quiet workspace that helps you focus. A good chair and reliable internet are important to stay connected throughout the sessions. 

We can’t wait to have you join us at TechEd Virtual! Together, we’ll explore how AI can transform business operations and create real impact. Register now, and let’s shape the future of AI together! We’re excited to engage with you, answer your questions, and learn from each other along the way. See you there!

entry.title: Re: Connecting external Output Management System to SAP Print Queue in SAP Cloud Solutions
entry.content:
@JP_Mendoza,
How is your architecture / implementation for "S4 Public Cloud using SAP BTP print service"?
Can you share more details on that? 
If SAP print API is used and “Notification type” is set to “Single notification”, a notification will be sent each time an item is created. See https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/b5670aaaa2364a29935f40b16499972d/754b6cdbb0d545918a7387c1ccaa7811.html?version=202310.001 
Is there any specific reason why you don't connect S4 Public Cloud system directly to Cloud Print Manager? Note: Cloud Print Manager does not support PUSH notifications (SAP_COM_0647).
Some external products support PUSH notifications (Certified Function: Notification for print queue job-items). See https://www.sap.com/dmc/exp/2013_09_adpd/enEN/#/solutions?filters=v:8048d886-1118-480e-876a-2548ffa10139.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content: Facing issue with below task, I get and error saying Customer is not linked to the Card. I did add the payment method to the customer, this was a trial card as mentioned.

entry.title: Re: Get individual primary key values from CDHDR table
entry.content:
Hello Noor,

 

Are you using SLT? This question doesn't seem related to SLT. 
If you have more information on the SAP product you're using I can try to direct you to the correct location.

 

Best Regards,
Michael
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Not able to see the batch and batch stock of Split Valuated materials in FSM.
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am currently facing a similar issue. Any help is very welcome.

entry.title: Re: CDS VIew Multiple Row for Status
entry.content:
I solved , i think . 
Problem was i forgot to do the Partitioning to start new count for each outbound, schedule line. 

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY outbound, sched_line ORDER BY TO_TIMESTAMP(ZSACCONTROLCON.latestchanged, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') DESC) AS DateRank,

entry.title: Re: WCM Control Key
entry.content: Hi Matjaz, My question is about configuring WCM control key . What parameters need to be set for WCM control key ? Supposing if I assign another control keyPMIN/PMEX , system will not trigger WCM feature, why ?

entry.title: Re: User-defined fields order
entry.content: Earlier I edited my form as LoHa showed. The form is OK for me, but not other users. My user is superuser.

entry.title: Apprirition d'un sigle croix rouge sur l'espace de travail
entry.content:
Hello,

One user is seeing a small white cross on a red circle next to the name of their workspace.
At first it does not bother them at all to work on their models, but we would like to understand the meaning of this alert.

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Apprirition d'un sigle croix rouge sur l'espace de tr...
entry.content:
Hello,

It usually happens when the security level is not set to "No restrictions" anymore.
If any of your named paths point to folders with more permissive write permissions, then your PowerDesigner installation is deemed to be insecure, your local workspace root displays a red shield.

Change the location of each of the insecure named path folders (or constrain their permissions) appropriately. If all of your named paths point to secure folders, your workspace root displays a green shield.

Kind regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Onboarding Email Templates editor is limited?
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it correct that the editor for the ONB 2.0 Email Templates is limited, these days?

I do no longer have the option to change the color of the font nor the font-size e.g.

Since when?

Are there ways (HTML?) to surpass this limitation? I would like to customize the template, if possible.

Thanks for the reply!

Best regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: Reason for addition of "NODE" row in CDS view entity
entry.content:
Got a dump while calling the OO ALV with structure_name = 'ZMY_CDS'  the only info I could get was this post.

 

    DATA gt_output TYPE TABLE OF zview_my_cds.

    go_alv_grid->set_table_for_first_display(
      EXPORTING
        i_buffer_active               = ''
        i_save                        = 'X'
        is_layout                     =  ls_layout
        i_structure_name              = 'ZVIEW_MY_CDS'
      CHANGING
        it_outtab                     = gt_output

 

 I Had to fix it with manually deleting the field. 

 

  CALL FUNCTION 'LVC_FIELDCATALOG_MERGE'
    EXPORTING
      i_structure_name = 'ZV_REPORTE_INVENTARIO'
    CHANGING
      ct_fieldcat      = gt_fieldcatalog.
    
  DELETE gt_fieldcatalog WHERE fieldname = '.NODE1'.

  *And then call the ALV without structure name but the fieldcat table.

 

Still don't know why does this happen though...

entry.title: Re: Get all tables mapped to an OBJECTCLASS in CDHDR
entry.content:
Hello Noor,

 

Are you using SLT? This question doesn't seem related to SLT. If you have more information on the SAP product you're using I can try to direct you to the correct location.

It seems like your question is better asked to BC-SRV-ASF-CHD (Change documents).

 

Best Regards,
Michael
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Mobile App login issues
entry.content: Hi, we are experiencing the same issue, have you solved the problem with the mobile app and, if so, how did you resolve it?

entry.title: Re: ADT installation error in eclipse
entry.content:
These are additional Eclipse dependencies needed by ADT, which need to be fetched from the Eclipse update site.

Do you have [x] Contact all update sites during install to find requried software enabled on the first page of the "Help ->Install new software" wizard?

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Olá, estou muito interessado em participar da iniciativa de habilidades digitais da SAP Learning. Meu nome é Davi e tenho formação e experiência em ABAP, além de estar me aprofundando no desenvolvimento web com ferramentas como JavaScript, React, Node.js e Express.js. Tenho um grande interesse em expandir meu conhecimento no ecossistema SAP, especialmente em áreas que possam complementar minha formação e experiência com desenvolvimento back-end e tecnologias SAP.

Além da minha formação técnica, estou constantemente em busca de oportunidades para me desenvolver e me adaptar às novas tendências no mercado de tecnologia. Acredito que o programa seria uma excelente oportunidade para fortalecer minhas habilidades e me preparar para novas certificações SAP.

Agradeço pela oportunidade e estou ansioso para seguir com o processo. Muito obrigado!

entry.title: Re: Automatic account assignment category in purchase req...
entry.content:
Hi,

I don't think so you can achieve this by standard functionality, however you can work with your developer and write the logic based on material type and it should pick the Account assignment automatically.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: Access a property in message mapping from a content m...
STO with multiple Schedule Lines will not modify them if new stock becomes available
entry.content:
I have an Intercompany STO with a qty of 1000 due on Oct 10.  I only have 900 in stock and a future PO for another 500 due on Oct 30.  The STO creates a single schedule line for 1000 and confirms 900.  When V_V2 is performed, a second schedule line appears for the uncommitted 100, with a date in November.  This occurs because the availably check is set to use future POs.  Again, this activity is all expected. 

Then we call our vendor and get the next delivery expedited to an earlier date.  The PO delivers early on Oct 01.  we now have 1400 units in stock, but V_V2 will not change the scheduled lines to meet the original requested due date.  It seems to look at the two schedule lines and confirms it can meet them.  My only choice is to open the STO and manually change the schedule lines.   This is fine for 1 STO but this manual intervention is not effective for the entire plant. 

Is there any way to get SAP (ECC6) to change the schedule lines to meet the original due date of Oct 10, now that we have Stock again? 

 

The STO requested 1000 on Oct 10.  The current Schedule lines will deliver 900 on Oct 10 and 100 in November.  This is not desirabl.

entry.title: Re: Mass Deletion of Contact Person - Customer Master Data
entry.content:
Hi Joao Pereira,

There are 2 options that you can use.

  1. The simple option is to use the code OV52. It allows you to delete the customer at the General level, Co. Code level, or at Sales Org level.
  2. Use t code XD99 and select KNA1 and search for field AUFSD. Set the indicator for all customers that you want to delete. It won’t delete the customer from the system but block it for further processing.

Thanks

Avnish

entry.title: Final alignment of SAP Inside Track PORTO 2024 lectures
entry.content:
Final alignment of SAP Inside Track PORTO lectures.

Thanks to our Sponsors.

entry.title: Re: Which localization to use when running B1 in Kazakhstan?
entry.content:
Hi,

Check the answer on the following thread:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/which-b1-localization-we-should-select-when-setting-up-b1-in-kazakhstan/qaq-p/13875082

You can also check with the Channel Sales Manager.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Share Your Experience about SAP Sales Performance Management and Earn a $25 Gift Voucher
entry.content:
At SAP, we value the voice of our customers and believe your feedback is crucial in helping others make informed decisions. That’s why we would like to invite you to share your thoughts on SAP Sales Performance Management solutions by leaving a review on TrustRadius, a trusted online platform for software and service ratings.

Your insights and experiences can help future users understand the benefits and impact of Sales Performance Management solutions. Whether it’s streamlining your commission processes, improving sales team performance, or achieving better visibility into your incentive strategies, your review can make a difference.

Why Write a Review?

  • Quick and Easy: Reviews take less than 10 minutes to complete.
  • Anonymous: You have the option to post your review anonymously.
  • $25 Gift Voucher: As a token of appreciation, you'll receive a $25 gift voucher upon submission of your review.

How to Get Started?

It’s simple—just click here TrustRadius: Software Reviews, Software Comparisons and More to start your review and share your experience with the TrustRadius community. Once submitted, you’ll receive your gift voucher as a thank you for your valuable time.

Invite Your Peers

We also encourage you to invite your peers to share their insights. The more voices we have, the richer and more helpful the feedback will be for everyone exploring SuccessFactors Incentive Management.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to reach out. Your input is greatly appreciated, and we look forward to hearing from you.

entry.title: Re: Access a property in message mapping from a content m...
entry.content: I have usted the mapping function of get Property , and I have null as a result event if the field STGE_LOC is populated and in the content modifier (I changed the name of the variable to STGE_LOC instead of Almacen_Codigo  in order to use the getProperty default funciton in the mapping

entry.title: Re: Eclipse, Field for creation user is missing in source...
entry.content: Because of the many comments of people still getting the error after fix, I have tried to reproduce and fix the error by myself and can confirm that the solution works. As Pekka has already mentioned, you also have to change the datatype of lastchangedby to abp_lastchange_user to proceed with the generation.

entry.title: Download alerts from Alert Inbox in SOLMAN
entry.content:
We need to download alert details from alert inbox. Could you please provide the steps.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Download alerts from Alert Inbox in SOLMAN
entry.content:
Hi,

To export alerts from the Alert Inbox, you can:

  1. Access Alert Inbox from your Fiori Launchpad
  2. Select the alert from the alert table
  3. In the table below, select Export -> Export to Microsoft Excel

Thank you,

SAP Support

In the result list I need to change the field as link to the single object, the user has to click on the description instead of the code to open the single object page.

How is possible to change the link to action field?

Thanks and Regards

Antonio

entry.title: Sap analytics cloud reset all presentation filters
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a story in SAC based on BW live data with prompt (company code, date).

I use presentation filters that I can use to filters some informations (Profit center, WBS).

I run the story filling the prompt with company 1000, year 2024.

If I filter lets say my story for one WBS, and I click on the icon prompt to change the company (2000), the story keeps the filter on WBS and of course its a non sense because this gives an empty result as WBS filtered is related to company 1000.

Is there a way to reset with scripting the presentation filters ?

thanks

Ma

entry.title: Time Account Balance is Duplicated
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an issue for Admins viewing Netherlands Time Accounts in the Time Off section on the Profile. As the Time Type 'Annual Leave' is mapped to 2 Time Accounts, it shows both accounts, but includes the balance for the second in the first. This is confusing and has led to employees being informed they have more leave than they actually do. e.g. like below, the total in green includes the total in red:

I understand that this is 'expected behaviour' (e.g 2699477), but has anyone found a way around this? I have tried renaming it to make it obvious, but then this shows in reports... Appreciate the advice!

Thanks, Liam

entry.title: Re: Profit center in settlement document in CCM
entry.content:
Hi @Naveen_Kumar_SD ,

For SAP CCM, if the profit center is not coming from the source document and you want to post your FI document with Profit center, then you will have to add that logic via Transfer Manager. 
Either default a fixed value or create your own logic to retrieve the profit center. 

You will most likely need the plant (from source document or default or other ways) in your settlement document for that if you want to retrieve PRCTR from MARC. 

Regards, 
Gauthier

I understand you used as a workaround the settings described above. Is there any way based on your knowledge to use date ranges where you can insert date periods selecting precises dates, without the need of inserting looking back or forward in terms of days?

entry.content:

We are trying to post the journal entry transaction with multi currencies lint items (Multi currency Accounting). But Currency and exchange rate are controlling in the header level of the journal entry. 

Example posting : 

Debit with the SGD currency 

Credit with the USD currency

Please let me know if there is any other options to change the currency in line item for journal posting.

 

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Re: J_1BEFD_COUNTRY obsolete in S4HANA
entry.content: Hi @fedaros, I've checked on sm30 and this table is still avaiable on S4. I just wanted to make sure that the table is still available as SAP has identified this custom code to be checked via readness check. Thanks for your feedback. Fernanda

entry.title: Re: Internal behaviour of dump marker and rsync marker in...
entry.content:
I'm not sure I understand the 1st question since there are a couple different topics intertwined.  Instead I'll throw out what comes to mind and see what's left over (confusion wise) ...

When the DSI is resumed with skip to resync marker you should see the DSI's state change to SkipUntil Resync.  At this point the DSI ignores all incoming transactions while it awaits the arrival of the resync marker.

Once the DSI receives the resync marker you should see the DSI's state change to SkipUntil Dump.  At this point the DSI continues to ignore all incoming transactions while it awaits the arrival of the dump marker.

Notice the resync marker doesn't replace the dump marker but rather comes before the dump marker.  The resync marker behaves similarly to the validate subscription marker (eg, [PDB] exec rs_marker 'validate subscription 0x0100006580000071') in that it allows the repserver to verify replication is working starting with the repagent reading the PDB transaction log and ending with the DSI successfully writing a new entry into the RDB's rs_lastcommit table.  If there are any problems anywhere within the replication path you'll see the DSI status does not change to SkipUntil Dump status (akin to a subscription validation failing and the status not changing to VALID/VALID).

The resync marker approach allows us to eliminate the cumbersome (re)creation of a subscription via the [drop/]define-dump-marker/activate/validate subscription approach, and is especially handy for folks (like me) who have long forgotten how to define-dump-marker/activate/validate subscription and instead just use create subscription.

----------------------------

As for the 2nd question my answer is Yes, use the resync marker approach.  But keep in mind this does not replace the dump marker step but rather replaces the [drop/]define-dump-marker/activate/validate subscription steps.

I routinely run create subscription (MSA/database) against an empty RDB database and then use the resync marker approach to get the DSI into the SkipUntil Dump state.

Once the resync marker approach became available (RS 15.6 ?) I haven't had a need to use the 'old' define-dump-marker/activate/validate subscription approach.

The resync marker approach works great with WS, too.

entry.title: ERROR WHEN LOADING AN ACCOUNTING ENTRY WITH EXCEL TEMPLATE
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to upload an accounting entry using the SAP Excel template, but when I fill in the template with the data I always get the following errors (see screenshot).

I don't know what it could be. I have tried copying and pasting the data and also entering the data manually, but I always get that error and I don't know what it could be.

Has anyone encountered this or have any idea what it could be?

It is a fairly large accounting entry, but I don't think that's the reason.

This is the menu item:

and this is the error in the SAP excel template:

The message says: The value " of the field Profit Center/ Credit Amount/ Debit Amount/ Cost Center is not valid.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

Ismael.

Best Regards.

FAFR

entry.content:
Hi Michael,

It is the combination of SLT & SAP DI together extract data from SAP ECC & publish data to Databricks. My goal is to check data freshness in Databricks. For that, I wanted to rely on CDHDR table  replicated into Databricks by SAP SLT & DI combo.

That's why I tagged all relevant products used in my environment.

I am unable to move to the SAP tag you mentioned ((I don't get in search results)).

Can you kindly do the needful please?

Br,

Noor.

entry.title: Re: Get all tables mapped to an OBJECTCLASS in CDHDR
entry.content:
Hello Noor,

 

You mentioned "I like to know a way to get all SAP ERP tables that get updated when an entry for a particular OBJECTCLASS is logged in CDHDR table.", how to do this wouldn't be something that SLT or DI could provide information on, SLT and DI don't make the changes on the source data. 

I believe we will have to see if ERP can provide a response on this. 

 

 

Best Regards,
Michael
SAP Support

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Managed System name should come in Subject of Inciden...
entry.content:
There are few settings for the incident description in incident creation configuration but it is possible customize incident description using MAI Text BAdI implementation.

See KBA 2560678 - How to create a MAI Text BAdI implementation

entry.content: Hi Fernanda, I remind that this table belongs, at least initially, to ECC classic report on SPED EFD ICMS and maybe due to this it was deprecated at same time that many other reports that moved to TDF and later ACR, DRC... But as this table still has is value for NFe and for TDF reporting, and dev tem couldn't drop/delete it from the system, it's still there. Regards, Fernando Da Rós

entry.title: Report that Shows Purchase Orders that have attachments uploaded.
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a report that shows purchase orders (approved, in-approval, etc. - preferable to include all statuses) that have at least one attachment? Perhaps there is a way to pull this through Monitor Purchase Orders or Manage Purchase Orders? Or a different application?

I am trying to easily identify what purchase orders have an attachment included without having to actually click and view every PO.

entry.title: Transitive attribute in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Preface

Transitive attribute is a useful feature in SAP BW, this blog will explore the possibility of implementing transitive attributes in SAP Datasphere

Disclaimer: All the data created are for demo purposes, the approach is used to demo the functionality of the currency conversion in SAP Datasphere, not intended for production design or usage.

Implementation:

Let's first draw the diagram to explain the concept of Transitive attribute, our goal is to display the attributes: Address and postcode from Company Code

Country Spend is transaction data, it has Country dimension, Company Code dimension and measure Amount.

Country dimension has attributes: Company Code, Language, and Company City

Company Code dimension has attributes: Address and Postcode

In SAP Datasphere, we will create the same data model according to the above diagram:

Company Code dimension with its attribute (no association, Company code as key):

Country dimension with its attribute ( Compound key: Country + Company Code, association to Company Code), Country dimension act as a bridge to navigate to Company Code

Association to Company Code dimension:

Country Spend transaction data with association only to Country dimension, not to Company dimension

Create an Analytical Model on top of Country Spend view

Important note: we enable the attribute Country only and can see the associated dimension: Country

If we click on associated dimension: Country, dimension Company Code with transitive attribute: Address and Postcode will show up

Now it is time to show the magic with Data Preview 😀:

The attribute of Company Code can display nicely in the final output.  

Summary:

The way to implement transitive attribute is similar to BW and functionality can be achieved perfectly in SAP Datasphere without much effort. 

Feel free to post any questions you may have, thank you for your time.

entry.title: Report(s) that show After the Fact (ATF) Purchase Orders
entry.content: I am looking for some guidance on how to run a report or set of reports that will show After-The-Fact (ATF) purchase orders. Specifically, I want to identify purchase orders that were created after the invoice was received. My initial thought was to compare Invoice date to purchase order date, as if the invoice date is before the PO date this would indicate an after the fact PO. However, it appears there is no way to easily connect or run a report that shows invoices with invoice date AND the corresponding PO number. Any help or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: API_PURCHASECONTRACT_PROCESS_SRV how to update Contra...
entry.content:
Hi 

Please refer to this KBA on this subject -3338491
https://me.sap.com/notes/3338491
You can use a patch in a batch eg: 
Your URL --- */sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_PURCHASECONTRACT_PROCESS_SRV;v=0002/$batch
content-type multipart/mixed;boundary=batch

payload example: 

--batch
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=changeset

--changeset
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

PATCH A_PurContrItmCndnAmount(PurchaseContract='4600047031',PurchaseContractItem='00010',ConditionValidityEndDate=datetime'9999-12-31T00%3A00%3A00',ConditionRecord='0000653090',ConditionSequentialNumber='01') HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json

{
"ConditionRateValue": "93.00"

}

--changeset--

--batch--

Kind regards
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to know the topic owner details in SAP Community...
entry.content: @kirankumar440 our experts all subscribe to tags and are informed like everyone else when new content is posted to one of those tags. No need to @ mention individual people and risk overloading their notifications.

entry.title: Re: Missing items during addition of ADT plugin to Eclipse
entry.content:
what eclipse package you downloaded? download this package

 

Eclipse IDE for Enterprise Java and Web Developers

entry.title: Re: Vertex accelerator
entry.content:
Hello,

Vertex Accelerator brings many tools that are important for the successful implementation of tax solutions with Vertex.  Many requirements which otherwise achieved via development can be done via customization now. For example: Tax data mapping allows mapping standard SAP table fields to Vertex mapping fields. This way additional data elements can be sent from SAP to Vertex for more accurate tax determination. Similarly, the tax code default tool brings tax code on AP transactions in SAP without the user selecting any tax codes. Vertex accelerator reduces custom development, reduces the need for training to share service team, and brings automation.

Thanks

Avnish

entry.title: Re: Adobe Document Services on SLES 15 SP6 non latin char...
entry.content: Nope, there is Adobe and Suse development involved. If you have simmilar case you can use 989575/2024 ticket as a reference.

entry.title: Shell Conversion - Remodeling of Aggregation Levels
entry.content:
Dear,

for a Shell Conversion I made the precheck of the BW-Objects with transaction RSB4HCONV (Transfer Cockpit). The BW where i made the check is a BW 7.5 on Hana.

One message of the precheck regarding the doings "before Transfer" is about aggregation levels.

There is a check message that says that the aggregation level needs to be remodelled. The reason for this is that the aggregation level has an infocube as its basis (in which navigation attributes are used). The note on remodelling https://me.sap.com/notes/2443001/E says that a multiprovider/composite provider must be built on the Infocube and the aggregation level must be built on this (before conversion). If a multiprovider/composite provider is built on the infocube and new aggregation levels are copied from the old ones, the new aggregation levels get new technical names.

Has anyone already had experience of how best to carry out this remodelling of aggregation levels? Because if there are new aggregation levels with new technical names, the queries based on the old aggregation levels will no longer work. This will also cause problems in the SAC, right?

Thanks,

Thomas

#BW4 Conversion, #Shell Conversion, #BW4HANA, #Aggregation Level

entry.title: Re: Setting Default Values for Create in ABAP RESTful application development
entry.content: I am trying out something similar. but not found any useful resource yet.

entry.title: Re: Stock Transfer
entry.content:
Hi 

Examples below: 
transfer posting from blocked stock to unrestricted via API 

Your URL */sap/opu/odata/sap/API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV/A_MaterialDocumentHeader
content-type application/json

Example payload

{
  "PostingDate" : "2024-09-25T00:00:00",
  "GoodsMovementCode" : "04",
  "to_MaterialDocumentItem" : [
    {
      "Plant" : "1010",
      "StorageLocation" : "101B",
      "Material" : "SAP-TEST-X1",
      "GoodsMovementType" : "343",
      "QuantityInEntryUnit" : "1",
      "IssuingOrReceivingPlant" : "1010",
      "IssuingOrReceivingStorageLoc" : "101A"
    }
  ]
}  

Movement types and goods movement codes
1. GM_Code 01: Goods receipt for purchase order
2. GM_Code 02: Goods receipt for production order
3. GM_Code 03: Goods issue
4. GM_Code 04: Transfer posting
5. GM_Code 05: Other goods receipts
6. GM_Code 06: Reversal of goods movements
7. GM_Code 07: Subsequent adjustment to a subcontract order

321 Transfer posting stock in quality inspection - unrestricted-use stock
The quantity is transferred from stock in quality inspection into unrestricted-use stock.

323 Transfer posting storage location to storage location - stock in quality inspection
The quantity is transferred from stock in quality inspection in the issuing storage location into stock in quality inspection in the receiving storage location.

325 Transfer posting storage location to storage location - blocked stock
The quantity is transferred from blocked stock in the issuing storage location into blocked stock in the receiving storage location.

343 Transfer posting blocked stock - unrestricted-use stock
The quantity is transferred from blocked stock to unrestricted-use stock.

349 Transfer posting from blocked stock to stock in quality inspection
The quantity is transferred from blocked stock to stock in quality inspection.

Kind regards
SAP Support

entry.title: SAP role for BW4-Conversion
entry.content:
Dear all,

To carry out a BW4 conversion, there is a list with the required authorisation objects in the note https://me.sap.com/notes/2383530.

Is there already a standard SAP role that contains all these authorisations (which are listed in the note in the appendix under ‘Authorisation_Objects_List_Conversion’) or do you have to create a separate role for this and maintain all authorisations manually?

 

Thanks,

Thomas

#BW4Conversion, #BW4HANA, #Authorizations

entry.content: I'm not sure if CALM has monitoring option for on premise MaxDB database. You should check it. For cloud environment only CMIS content servers are supported.

entry.title: Subscriptions: Sales Order without Customer
entry.content:
Scenario: We sell products that include the option to activate a subscription license after the sale. There is no additional price for the subscription, it is "free" to the customer.

Requirement: From an accounting perspective, we will assign a revenue amount to the subscription. But, we are thinking we will need two sales orders: (1) for the original sale to the customer and (2) a second order for the activation of the license.  The second order will not be able to have the customer as there is no further charge; but, we think we need it at the time of activation to create the RAR item.

Can we have a Sales Order without a customer?  Is there some other option we should be considering?

SAP Revenue Accounting and Reporting

entry.title: Re: In SAP Fieldglass, is it possible to autofill time sheets?
entry.content: Thanks for your question! To get you the best answer, we may need additional context of your business rules and process. Time can be autofilled via a time sheet upload/integration if you’re trying to eliminate a redundant time entry system or step. This assumes the hours are submitted in another system, then they can come over approved or pending approval. Time from the first day can also be copied to populate the remaining days on the timesheet itself by using a button that says “Copy values” on the left corner of the Day field. There is not a native config or rule that can auto-fill time sheets in the UI without an integration. Generally contingent labors payroll rules vary from full time employees, including variable work hours with unique payroll rules per location, multiple cost allocations may be needed, varying types of labor classification, etc. We would be happy to work with you directly to make sure the solution or guidance we offer is addressing your need. Please contact us via https://support.fieldglass.com/Fieldglass Thank you.

entry.title: Re: In SAP Fieldglass, is it possible to autofill time sh...
entry.content:
Thanks for your question! To get you the best answer, we may need additional context of your business rules and process.

Time can be autofilled via a time sheet upload/integration if you’re trying to eliminate a redundant time entry system or step.  This assumes the hours are submitted in another system, then they can come over approved or pending approval.

Time from the first day can also be copied to populate the remaining days on the timesheet itself by using a button that says “Copy values” on the left corner of the Day field.

There is not a native config or rule that can auto-fill time sheets in the UI without an integration. Generally contingent labors payroll rules vary from full time employees, including variable work hours with unique payroll rules per location, multiple cost allocations may be needed, varying types of labor classification, etc. 

We would be happy to work with you directly to make sure the solution or guidance we offer is addressing your need.  Please contact us via https://support.fieldglass.com/Fieldglass

Thank you.

entry.title: digital skills Initiative
entry.content: Hello @David_Chaviano  I am excited to participate in the Digital Skills Initiative, as I believe it aligns perfectly with my professional background and future aspirations. With over 2o years of experience in supply chain management, logistics, and leadership roles, including my current position at Boeing, I have developed a strong analytical mindset and adaptability to emerging technologies. I am eager to expand my digital skills to stay competitive in today’s evolving workforce. This program will enhance my ability to leverage technology in streamlining operations and decision-making, making me a valuable asset to any team. I look forward to learning and contributing to this initiative.

entry.title: Is there an Internal Order field available in S4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Solved: Internal order in S4HANA Public Cloud 3SL - SAP Community

The above thread seems to suggest that Internal orders are available in Public Cloud just without the same variations that there were in the past. 

Is this indeed the case and if so can I please be provided with some config specs on said field?

entry.title: Re: Remote Code Analysis in ATC - One central check system for multiple systems on various releases
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

Is the Custom Code Migration app on SAP BTP ABAP environment free or does it have an additional cost? How does it work to purchase, configure, run, etc.?

Best Regards,

FAFR
